columns.name: CompanyName
columns.description: Name of the company associated with the findings summary.

columns.name: CompanyGuid
columns.description: GUID of the company associated with the findings summary.

columns.name: StartDate
columns.description: Start date of the reporting period (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: EndDate
columns.description: End date of the reporting period (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: Stats
columns.description: Array of per-stat objects. Expanded row-per-stat at query time by the KQL parser via mv-expand into Name, StatId, Confidence, EventCount, HostCount, FirstSeen columns.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name identifier for multi-instance tracking.
